name: www.pransystems.com
message: [AI generated] Pran Systems Inc is a global tech company based in California, USA. Well versed in electronic design, they provide services including wireless solutions, sensor-based applications, and IoT solutions. From consumer electronics to custom product development, they are committed to delivering high-quality, cost-effective technology solutions. They also offer design solutions for high-speed digital design, mixed-signal, and analog design.
